violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

Sausage and egg were observed held at 115 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Sausage and egg were reheated to above 165 DF at the time of inspection. Steam table was turned up. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishments RICFSM is expired. Establishment is to renew/re-apply for a RICFSM. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025
Turkey was observed being held past the date of disposition. Turkey was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
Milk chest #1 gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

Cheese sticks were observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved cheese sticks to another refrigerator. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

Inspector observed employee not washing hands after using the restroom and prior to returning to work. PIC informed; employee washed hands before returning to work. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024
Milk cooler located in the service area was not in good repair. Inspector observed loose latch at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

Inspector observed Shredded cheddar cheese to be left out on service line was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC informed and moved to refrigerator. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2023
Whole fruits were observed not protected from contamination. PIC informed Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2023
